{{Quote|Apply now for Pilot's Life Insurance. Don't let your loved ones down. Prepare for the future in case of a disaster. Contact an Allied Life Insurance agent ASAP. You never know when your number is up.|Leed Quarrezz|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Leed Quarrezz''' was an insurance agent for [[Allied Life Inc.]] Quarrezz sent an [[e-mail]] message offering a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot's]] life insurance policy to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
